title: thelypteris sancta var. hirta
intro: Thelypteris sancta var. hirta, also known as the Sacred Maiden Hair Fern or Rough Maiden Hair Fern, is a variety of the Thelypteris sancta fern species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris sancta var. hirta include reducing fever and treating wounds, as well as relieving respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a decoction to create a tea for medicinal use.
